title: Shopping return or exchange
subtitle: Return an item and explain why.
duolingoBridge: A2 daily life includes small customer-service situations.
overview: Knowledge point 1: je voudrais échanger / retourner.
Knowledge point 2: explain the reason simply.

sections.title: Return map
rows: I would like to return this item
I would like to exchange it

items.fr: Bonjour, je voudrais retourner cet article.
items.en: Hello, I would like to return this item.

items.fr: Il est trop petit pour moi.
items.en: It is too small for me.

items.fr: Je voudrais l’échanger contre une taille plus grande.
items.en: I would like to exchange it for a bigger size.
items.es: Quisiera cambiarlo por una talla más grande.

items.fr: J’ai le reçu dans mon sac.
items.en: I have the receipt in my bag.
items.es: Tengo el recibo en mi bolsa.
